ddls:
CREATE TABLE "inventory_items" (
  "item_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory item */,
  "item_name" TEXT /* Name of the inventory item */,
  "item_type" TEXT /* Type of the inventory item */,
  "unit" TEXT /* Unit of measure for the inventory item */,
  "expiration_date" TEXT /* Expiration date of the inventory item */,
  "reorder_level" INTEGER /* Reorder level for the inventory item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier of the inventory item */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "locations" (
  "location_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each location */,
  "location_name" TEXT /* Name of the location */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for inquiries about the location */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the location */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the location */,
  "manager_id" INTEGER /* ID of the manager responsible for the location */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_locations_manager_id FOREIGN KEY ("manager_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_records" (
  "record_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the transaction occurred */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_type" TEXT /* Type of transaction (e.g., distributed, redistributed, counted) */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of items involved in the transaction */,
  "transaction_date" TEXT /* Date when the transaction occurred */,
  "remarks" TEXT /* Additional remarks or notes about the transaction */,
  "batch_number" TEXT /* Batch number of the inventory item */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the transaction */,
  "requisition_id" TEXT /* ID of the requisition order for the transaction */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user who performed the transaction */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("record_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_records_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_records_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_records_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_records_requisition_id FOREIGN KEY ("requisition_id") REFERENCES requisition_orders ("requisition_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_records_supplier_id FOREIGN KEY ("supplier_id") REFERENCES suppliers ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "inventory_balances" (
  "balance_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each inventory balance record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item */,
  "opening_balance" INTEGER /* Opening balance of the inventory item at the start of the period */,
  "closing_balance" INTEGER /* Closing balance of the inventory item at the end of the period */,
  "date" TEXT /* Date for which the balance is recorded */,
  "last_count_date" TEXT /* Date of the last physical count for the inventory item */,
  "reorder_date" TEXT /* Date when a reorder was initiated */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("balance_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_balances_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_inventory_balances_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "stock_out_days" (
  "stock_out_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each stock-out record */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item */,
  "stock_out_days" INTEGER /* Number of days the item was out of stock */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Start date of the stock-out period */,
  "end_date" TEXT /* End date of the stock-out period */,
  "reason" TEXT /* Reason for the stock-out */,
  "action_taken" TEXT /* Actions taken to resolve the stock-out */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("stock_out_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_out_days_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_stock_out_days_item_id FOREIGN KEY ("item_id") REFERENCES inventory_items ("item_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "patient_art" (
  "patient_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each patient */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location where the patient is being treated */,
  "start_date" TEXT /* Date when the patient started ART */,
  "retained" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the patient is still retained on ART */,
  "last_appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the patient's last appointment */,
  "next_appointment_date" TEXT /* Date of the next scheduled appointment */,
  "notes" TEXT /* Additional notes or comments about the patient's status */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("patient_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_patient_art_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "business_rules" (
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each business rule */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the business rule */,
  "left_side" TEXT /* Left side of the business rule expression */,
  "operator" TEXT /* Operator used in the business rule expression */,
  "right_side" TEXT /* Right side of the business rule expression */,
  "last_updated" TEXT /* Date when the business rule was last updated */,
  "uid" TEXT /* Unique identifier for the business rule */,
  "priority" INTEGER /* Priority level of the business rule */,
  "active" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the rule is active */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("rule_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "rule_violations" (
  "violation_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each rule violation */,
  "rule_id" INTEGER /* ID of the business rule that was violated */,
  "violation_date" TEXT /* Date when the violation occurred */,
  "description" TEXT /* Description of the violation */,
  "resolved" INTEGER /* Indicates whether the violation has been resolved */,
  "resolution_date" TEXT /* Date when the violation was resolved */,
  "resolved_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who resolved the violation */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("violation_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_violations_rule_id FOREIGN KEY ("rule_id") REFERENCES business_rules ("rule_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_rule_violations_resolved_by FOREIGN KEY ("resolved_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "users" (
  "user_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each user */,
  "user_name" TEXT /* Full name of the user */,
  "email" TEXT /* Email address of the user */,
  "role" TEXT /* Role of the user (e.g., inventory manager, clinic staff, admin) */,
  "password_hash" TEXT /* Hashed password of the user */,
  "last_login_date" TEXT /* Date of the user's last login */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the user (e.g., active, inactive) */,
  "department" TEXT /* Department of the user */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "access_logs" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each access event */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the inventory data */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the inventory data was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, edit, report) */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the access was made */,
  "session_id" TEXT /* Session ID for the access event */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_access_logs_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "reports" (
  "report_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location for which the report is generated */,
  "report_type" TEXT /* Type of report (e.g., inventory status, ART retention) */,
  "report_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was generated */,
  "file_path" TEXT /* File path to the generated report */,
  "summary" TEXT /* Brief summary of the report content */,
  "generated_by" INTEGER /* ID of the user who generated the report */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the report (e.g., draft, final) */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_location_id FOREIGN KEY ("location_id") REFERENCES locations ("location_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_reports_generated_by FOREIGN KEY ("generated_by") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "report_access" (
  "access_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each report access event */,
  "report_id" INTEGER /* ID of the report being accessed */,
  "user_id" INTEGER /* ID of the user accessing the report */,
  "access_date" TEXT /* Date when the report was accessed */,
  "action" TEXT /* Action performed by the user (e.g., view, download, print) */,
  "device" TEXT /* Device from which the report was accessed */,
  "ip_address" TEXT /* IP address from which the report was accessed */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("access_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_report_id FOREIGN KEY ("report_id") REFERENCES reports ("report_id"), 
  CONSTRAINT fk_report_access_user_id FOREIGN KEY ("user_id") REFERENCES users ("user_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "suppliers" (
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* Unique identifier for each supplier */,
  "supplier_name" TEXT /* Name of the supplier */,
  "contact_email" TEXT /* Contact email for the supplier */,
  "phone_number" TEXT /* Contact phone number for the supplier */,
  "address" TEXT /* Detailed address of the supplier */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("supplier_id")
)

CREATE TABLE "requisition_orders" (
  "requisition_id" TEXT /* Unique identifier for each requisition order */,
  "location_id" INTEGER /* ID of the location placing the order */,
  "item_id" INTEGER /* ID of the inventory item being ordered */,
  "quantity" INTEGER /* Quantity of the item being ordered */,
  "order_date" TEXT /* Date when the order was placed */,
  "expected_delivery_date" TEXT /* Expected delivery date of the order */,
  "status" TEXT /* Status of the order (e.g., pending, delivered, canceled) */,
  "supplier_id" INTEGER /* ID of the supplier for the order */,
  PRIMARY KEY ("requisition_id")
)
